email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor B2B Growth Marketing Specialist bij Astra+. Jouw focus op meetbare groei en data-gedreven marketing sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

Bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast pas ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data en GEO-optimalisatie toe om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben gewend om campagneprestaties te analyseren met tools zoals Google Analytics, Search Console en SEMrush.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik werk graag hands-on, neem verantwoordelijkheid en leer snel nieuwe tools zoals HubSpot.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the B2B Growth Marketing Specialist position at Astra+. Your focus on measurable growth and data-driven marketing aligns perfectly with my experience and ambitions.

At Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I apply structured data and GEO optimization to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am used to analyzing campaign performance with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am currently taking classes to improve further. I enjoy working hands-on, taking ownership, and quickly learning new tools like HubSpot.

I look forward to discussing my motivation and skills in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor B2B Growth Marketing Specialist bij Astra+ las, voelde het alsof deze op maat voor mij geschreven was. Jullie missie om marketing om te zetten in meetbare groei, met een sterke focus op data en resultaat, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en ambitie.

Bij Episto werk ik dagelijks aan on-page SEO, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogcontent en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om continue verbetering te realiseren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema), entity-optimalisatie en een llms.txt-bestand geïmplementeerd om de zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines te verbeteren – een ervaring die direct relevant is voor GEO en AEO.

Hoewel ik nog geen directe HubSpot-ervaring heb, ben ik gemotiveerd om dit snel te leren. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling (AngularJS, JavaScript) en mijn analytische aanpak maken dat ik snel nieuwe tools eigen maak. Ik werk graag hands-on, neem verantwoordelijkheid en functioneer goed in dynamische omgevingen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Astra+ is de nadruk op samenwerking en het echt onderdeel worden van het klantenteam. Ik communiceer helder in het Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg lessen om dit te verbeteren. Ik ben ervan overtuigd dat ik met mijn drive en leergierigheid een waardevolle bijdrage kan leveren aan jullie team en klanten.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

When I read the vacancy for B2B Growth Marketing Specialist at Astra+, it felt tailor-made for me. Your mission to turn marketing into measurable growth, with a strong focus on data and results, aligns perfectly with my experience and ambition.

At Episto, I work daily on on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blog content, and manage WordPress sites. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to drive continuous improvement. On my own project mirook.com, I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines – experience directly relevant to GEO and AEO.

Although I don't have direct HubSpot experience yet, I am motivated to learn quickly. My technical background in web development (AngularJS, JavaScript) and analytical approach enable me to master new tools fast. I enjoy working hands-on, taking ownership, and thrive in dynamic environments.

What appeals to me about Astra+ is the emphasis on collaboration and truly becoming part of the client team. I communicate clearly in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am taking classes to improve. I am confident that with my drive and eagerness to learn, I can make a valuable contribution to your team and clients.

I hope to elaborate on my motivation and skills in a personal conversation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- On-page SEO, keyword research, and content writing for B2B client websites at Episto
- Technical SEO/GEO audits and structured data implementation (JSON-LD schema) on mirook.com
- Proficient in analytics tools: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs
- WordPress site building and management with Elementor and Astra theme
- B1 Dutch with active improvement; fluent English and Turkish
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
